calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-15-2015 Vacated

Plaintiff Jennifer Johnson'S Motion To Compel Defendant'S Responses To Discovery, And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-26-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Charles Redfield of Low, Ball & Lynch telephone number 415-980-6630 for Defendant.

No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. Counsel for the Defendant stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The Court adopted the tentative ruling. Plaintiff Jennifer Johnson's Motion To Compel Defendant's Responses To Discovery, And Request For Sanctions is granted. Defendants SH Property and Bohan shall provide responses to the discovery at issue by July 20, 2015. Sanctions of $350 are awarded against Defendants, but not their counsel. Defendants' counsel from Low, Ball and Lynch is not obligated to participate in the drafting of the discovery responses as Judge Quidachay has ruled that the firm may withdraw from representation after the hearing on this matter. Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendants Responses To Discovery, And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-09-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF JENNIFER JOHNSON's Motion To Compel Defendant's Responses To Discovery, And Request For Sanctions is TRANSFERRED to Department 301 to be heard on June 26, 2015 at 9:00 a.m. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to Department 301 no later than June 12, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing department and date. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar May-26-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Charles Redfield (415-981-6630) appearing for Defendant and moving party SH Property. No other apperances.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS SH PROPERTY and THE BOHAN COMPANYS' MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD IS GRANTED in part. Low, Ball and Lynch shall be relieved as counsel after pending discovery motion (addressing discovery served on March 11, 2015) is resolved. Modified order addressing the discover signed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk:N. Wong, Not Reported, D501.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
